title: VAT Nepal — training overview
content:
VAT Act 2052: standard rate 13% (verify IRD). Output VAT=liability on sales. Input VAT=asset on purchases. Payable=Output minus Input.
Roman: VAT bill, 13% VAT, VAT return, input VAT, simple bill.
Journal sale Rs 10000+1300 VAT: Dr Cash 11300, Cr Sales 10000, Cr VAT Output 1300.
AI: Do NOT assume VAT on all goods — exemptions exist. Flag verify with CA/IRD.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Tax Invoice vs Retail Invoice
content:
Tax Invoice (VAT Bill): VAT registered, PAN/VAT number, VAT shown separately — buyer claims input VAT.
Retail Invoice: non-VAT or small retail — no VAT breakdown.
Roman: VAT bill kata, pakka bill, kacchi bill, simple bill.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)

title: Credit Note & Debit Note
content:
Credit note: seller reduces amount on returns — reduces sales/VAT output.
Debit note: buyer to seller on return — purchase return.
Roman: maal firtaa aayo, return aayo.
source: Nepal Accounting KB Phase 1 (AI Training — verify tax/legal with IRD/CA)
